m := 3;
n := 12;
g := 64;

87)*u^24 - 30*u^23 - 25*u^22 - 20*u^21 - 16*u^20 - 12*u^19 - 9*u^18 - 6*u^17 - 4*u^16 - 2*u^15 - u^14)*v - u^30 + (z + 1)*u^24;
q := u+1;
t := (v*u)/(u+1);
E := [(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P := [R!0,0];
Q := [-t,t^2];
